summary: Excellent matrix capture preserves the ambience of a solid show, highlighted by a soaring China Cat Sunflower → The Rider sequence.
review: Fans rave about this recording’s vivid ambience and stereo-friendly mix, noting that the matrix source delivers clear sound throughout. The performance shines on the China Cat Sunflower → The Rider transition, even though Jerry’s guitar dips out early in the first tune before coming back strong.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings and praise for both performance (≈4/5) and recording quality (≈4.5/5) yield a weighted average around 4.2.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Spectacular capture of ambience; praised for stereo playback, no major flaws reported though one reviewer hinted the recording was less than perfect compared to the show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Positive flow highlighted by the China>Rider sequence; minor gripe about Jerry dropping out early but overall a strong performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Drops out for most of China Cat Sunflower, returns later in The Rider – noted as a brief lapse.
